title: taraxacum boreum
intro: Taraxacum boreum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial herb native to Europe, but also found in many other parts of the world. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its high levels of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum boreum include its ability to support liver health, act as a natural diuretic, and help to lower blood pressure. Taraxacum boreum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
